title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body: 6 reports triaged. Actions taken: banned spam_wave_42 (phishing across 6 channels), banned toxic_runner (targeted harassment of newcomers), warned bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automation in help channels). No action taken on reports involving trusted members (trusted_helper, core_maintainer) per policy. Low-priority formatting report (new_member_17) closed without action.
